title: Trust Adjuster Primitive v1
description: Schema for P36 TrustAdjuster — compliance-to-identity loop: violations reduce an agent's trust tier. Enforces K3 (IDENTITY): trust tier changes require evidence and operator approval. Severity maps to tier reduction steps.

adjustment_id.description: Unique identifier for this trust adjustment.

agent_id.description: Agent whose trust tier is being adjusted.

violation_refs.description: References to compliance violations justifying the adjustment.

severity.description: Severity of the violations. Maps to tier reduction steps: low=1, medium=2, high=3, critical=direct to REVOKED.

adjusted_by.description: Identity of the operator or system authorizing the adjustment.

operator_approval.description: Whether the operator explicitly approved this adjustment.

automated.description: Whether this adjustment was triggered automatically by a compliance pipeline.

authority.description: Authority gate: who authorized the tier change.

receipt.description: Receipt gate: hash-chained proof of adjustment.
